name: Strawberry Rhubarb Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Hull strawberries, rinse and crush.
2. Finely chop rhubarb.
3. In a 8 qt. saucepan add fruit, lemon juice and pectin.
4. Measure sugar in a bowl and set aside.
5. Bring fruit mixture to a boil over high heat, stirring constantly.
6. Stir in sugar.
7. Return to a full rolling boil and boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
8. Remove from heat.
9. Skim off foam.
10. Ladle into hot sterilized jars leaving 1/4 inch head space.
11. Adjust caps.
12. Process 10 minutes in a boiling-water canner.
13. Let jam cool 12 -24 hours.
